entities.name: NON-CODING RNAS
entities.description: RNAs that do not code for proteins and act as riboregulators to regulate plant growth, development, and stress responses

entities.name: MESSENGER RNA
entities.description: RNA molecules that serve as a messenger in protein synthesis

entities.name: RIBOSOMAL RNA
entities.description: RNA molecules that form the structural and catalytic core of ribosomes

entities.name: TRANSFER RNA
entities.description: RNA molecules that deliver amino acids to the ribosome during translation

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The process of physical growth in plants

entities.name: PLANT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of maturation and differentiation in plants

entities.name: STRESS RESPONSES
entities.description: The reactions of plants to environmental stressors

entities.name: LONG NON-CODING RNAS
entities.description: Non-coding RNAs that are longer in length and exert control over biological processes

entities.name: MICRO RNAS
entities.description: A class of small non-coding RNAs that regulate gene expression

entities.name: SMALL INTERFERING RNAS
entities.description: A class of small non-coding RNAs involved in RNA interference

entities.name: MI RNA VARIANTS
entities.description: Variants of microRNAs known as isomiRs

entities.name: CIRCULAR RNAS
entities.description: Non-coding RNAs that form a closed loop structure

entities.name: DERIVED NCRNAS
entities.description: Non-coding RNAs derived from other RNA sources

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The application of genetic or breeding techniques to enhance crop characteristics

entities.name: AGRICULTURALLY IMPORTANT TRAITS
entities.description: Specific plant characteristics that are targeted for improvement in agriculture
